---
name: test-greeting
description: >
  Greet the user in different languages.
  Use when the user asks for a greeting or wants to say hello.
allowed-tools: web_search
parameters:
  default_language: english
---

# Greeting Skill

You can greet users in multiple languages.

## Supported Languages
- English: Hello!
- Spanish: Hola!
- Japanese: Konnichiwa!

Use the `default_language` parameter to set the default.
